utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists five items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each item is fully specified with the type of insurance and associated costs. Health coverage includes physical and mental health insurance with a cost (€330/month); property coverage includes home/contents insurance with a cost (€95/month); travel coverage includes travel insurance with a cost (€115/month); additional_services are described with included features and note that no separate costs are identified; total_budget includes a complete monthly and annual cost breakdown (€540/month, €6480/year). Therefore, all five required items are present and fully detailed according to the requested format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main components: (1) health_coverage: PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical and mental health), (2) property_coverage: LifeFirst Standard Plan, and (3) travel_coverage: PrimeTravel Premium Plan. From the ground-truth ratings, 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' appears in both physical_health and mental_health categories under primary_health_coverage, with ratings of 10 each. 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' appears under primary_health_coverage (physical_health) with a rating of 8, but the property part uses 'LifeFirst Standard Plan, home/contents insurance'; the closest match in property_protection is 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage', which also has a rating of 8. 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' appears under mobility_coverage (travel_insurance) with a rating of 10. Therefore, the correct mapping is: PrimeCare Premium Plan → 10, LifeFirst Standard Plan (home/contents) → 8, PrimeTravel Premium Plan → 10.
